column2: CAFSI Logs In And Requests Evidence
column3: ['Log in as a CAA Flight Safety Investigator. ', 'Request complete recorded evidence for an incident investigation. ', 'Verify that no DPIA or MOR obligations are generated. ']
column4: ['Successfully log in to the system with valid credentials. ', 'The system displays all available recorded evidence related to the specified incident investigation. ', 'No DPIA or MOR obligations are created during the process of requesting and viewing the complete recorded evidence. ']
